free_text: Measurement of the average SIGMA-TOT and SIGMA-SCT
for the  niobium, molybdenum and cadmium
Thermal power reactor of obninsk Atomic
Neutron filter consisting of 163 g/cm2 iron,
24.4 keV, energy spread 0.5 keV, flux 4.E+3 n/cm2/sec.
Battery of ten He-3 counters of the 'CHM-18'
(alias SNM-18) type , places as ring  plex
cylinder of 350 mm long, inner diameter 65 mm, outer
diameter 140 mm. Detector was covered by Cd of 1mm
Metal samples of natural Cd, Nb, Mo of 99.9% purity .
Background was measured by Ti filter.
Duplicative line in Subent 016 DATA block was deleted.
Scattering c-s was defined by normalization to Pb
scattering c-s, which was defined from total
